tests.headline: Foreign signature inside a comment

Foreign signature inside a comment

First comment (the problem is unlikely here). Here comes a foreign signature. Example (talk) 06:00, 27 July 2018 (UTC) — Example (talk) 14:50, 5 March 2020 (UTC)

Here comes a foreign signature. Example (talk) 06:00, 27 July 2018 (UTC) And another foreign signature. Example (talk) 06:10, 27 July 2018 (UTC) This time with some text after it. Last foreign signature at this line. - Example2 (talk) 06:20, 27 July 2018 (UTC). Some text after. — Example (talk) 15:00, 5 March 2020 (UTC)
